# Eldur Studio

Eldur Studio builds custom AI agents for B2B marketing and sales ops teams.
We design, wire, and hand off agentic workflows — the client owns the system
after we're done. No ongoing dependency on us, no SaaS subscription for the
agent layer.

## What we do

- Lead qualification and enrichment agents (Explorium, Apollo, Clay integrations)
- Content publishing automation (Notion → Jekyll, multi-channel distribution)
- CRM hygiene and enrichment pipelines (Notion, HubSpot, Salesforce)
- Ad monitoring and alerting agents
- Competitive intelligence monitoring
- Custom Notion CRMs for relationship-heavy B2B teams

## Who we work with

10–50 person B2B companies with marketing teams of 1–3 people who want to
compete with larger teams without hiring. We're the right fit when you have
a clear ICP, some existing tooling, and want systems that run themselves.

## Key pages

- Contact: info@eldur.studio

## Notable case studies

- Lead enrichment agent (Explorium + Notion + Pipedream): 400+ contacts, 85%
  match rate, 98% time reduction vs manual LinkedIn research.
  https://eldur.studio/results/people-enrichment-agent/
- Scalapay merchant directory (Webflow + Sanity headless CMS, thousands of
  listings with Algolia search).
  https://eldur.studio/results/scalapay-webflow-directory-headless-cms/
